expected.notes: Student filed Form 8843 (answers.filed_8843=yes) so rule does not fire despite having fewer than 6 years in US.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'form_8843_missing', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.filed_8843 eq no
  - answers.years_in_us lt 6
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
